---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for the starter, docs, or developer workflow
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed change

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Why it helps

Explain why this would make the starter more useful.

## Scope

Choose the most relevant area:

- routing logic
- Tokvera tracing
- mock mode
- docs
- developer experience
- integrations

## Additional context

Add examples, links, or screenshots if useful.
